summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Free 60 artwork missing after updating from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest on Studio iOS or PTT, with no artwork displayed and DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery.
description_clean: Free 60 artwork missing. Update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working on Studio iOS or PTT. No artwork displayed. DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery.
steps: 1. Start from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) on Studio iOS or PTT.
2. Attempt to update to the latest version.
3. Observe that no artwork is displayed after the update.
4. Note that DFU (Device Firmware Update) is not possible due to low iPhone battery.
expected: Free 60 artwork should be displayed after updating to the latest version.
actual: Free 60 artwork is missing. No artwork displayed after update. DFU cannot be performed due to low iPhone battery.
